ddls:
CREATE TABLE "jobs" (
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job listing */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Title of the job */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company posting the job */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the job is located */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the job is located */,
  "salary_range" TEXT /* Salary range for the job */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the job */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the job listing */,
  "posted_date" TEXT /* Date the job was posted */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Status indicating if the job is active */,
  "job_description" TEXT /* Description of the job */,
  "job_requirements" TEXT /* Requirements for the job */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department where the job is posted */,
  "recruiter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recruiter who posted the job */,
  "job_type" TEXT /* Type of the job (e.g., full-time, part-time, contract) */,
  "work_type" TEXT /* Work arrangement (e.g., on-site, remote, hybrid) */,
  "job_level" TEXT /* Level of the job (e.g., entry-level, mid-level, senior) */,
  "number_of_positions" INTEGER /* Number of positions available for the job */,
  "application_deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for job applications */,
  "benefits" TEXT /* Benefits offered for the job */,
  "skills_required" TEXT /* Specific skills required for the job */,
  "education_requirements" TEXT /* Educational requirements for the job */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jobs_recruiter_id FOREIGN KEY ("recruiter_id") REFERENCES recruiters ("recruiter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jobs_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jobs_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Headquarters location of the company */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the company */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the company */,
  "company_size" TEXT /* Size of the company (e.g., small, medium, large) */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "company_type" TEXT /* Type of the company (e.g., public, private, non-profit) */,
  "company_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "department_description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager of the department */,
  "department_size" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the department */,
  "department_location" TEXT /* Physical location of the department */,
  "department_budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated to the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recruiters" (
  "recruiter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recruiter */,
  "recruiter_name" TEXT /* Full name of the recruiter */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the recruiter */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the recruiter */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the recruiter works for */,
  "recruiter_position" TEXT /* Position or title of the recruiter */,
  "recruiter_bio" TEXT /* Brief bio of the recruiter */,
  "recruiter_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience the recruiter has */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recruiter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recruiters_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Full name of the manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the manager */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the manager */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the manager works for */,
  "manager_position" TEXT /* Position or title of the manager */,
  "manager_bio" TEXT /* Brief bio of the manager */,
  "manager_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience the manager has */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_managers_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "candidate_name" TEXT /* Full name of the candidate */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the candidate */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the candidate */,
  "resume_url" TEXT /* URL to the candidate's resume */,
  "cover_letter_url" TEXT /* URL to the candidate's cover letter */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date the candidate applied */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the candidate's application (e.g., pending, interviewed, hired) */,
  "candidate_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the candidate */,
  "candidate_dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the candidate */,
  "candidate_address" TEXT /* Address of the candidate */,
  "candidate_nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the candidate */,
  "candidate_education" TEXT /* Educational background of the candidate */,
  "candidate_experience" TEXT /* Work experience of the candidate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job being applied for */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate applying */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date the application was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the application (e.g., pending, interviewed, hired) */,
  "recruiter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recruiter managing the application */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager overseeing the application */,
  "application_source" TEXT /* Source of the application (e.g., job board, referral, direct application) */,
  "application_feedback" TEXT /* Feedback on the application */,
  "application_rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the application (e.g., on a scale of 1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES jobs ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_recruiter_id FOREIGN KEY ("recruiter_id") REFERENCES recruiters ("recruiter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interviews" (
  "interview_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interview */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application being interviewed */,
  "interview_date" TEXT /* Date of the interview */,
  "interviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interviewer */,
  "interview_type" TEXT /* Type of interview (e.g., phone, in-person) */,
  "interview_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the interview */,
  "interview_format" TEXT /* Format of the interview (e.g., individual, panel) */,
  "interview_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the interview in minutes */,
  "interview_rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the candidate during the interview (e.g., on a scale of 1-5) */,
  "interview_feedback" TEXT /* Feedback on the interview */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interview_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interviews_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interviews_interviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("interviewer_id") REFERENCES interviewers ("interviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interviewers" (
  "interviewer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interviewer */,
  "interviewer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the interviewer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the interviewer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the interviewer */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the interviewer works for */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the interviewer is from */,
  "interviewer_position" TEXT /* Position or title of the interviewer */,
  "interviewer_bio" TEXT /* Brief bio of the interviewer */,
  "interviewer_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience the interviewer has */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interviewer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interviewers_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interviewers_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_boards" (
  "job_board_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job board */,
  "job_board_name" TEXT /* Name of the job board */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the job board */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the job board */,
  "job_board_type" TEXT /* Type of job board (e.g., general, niche, industry-specific) */,
  "job_board_rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the job board (e.g., on a scale of 1-5) */,
  "job_board_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the job board */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_board_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_board_postings" (
  "posting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job board posting */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job being posted */,
  "job_board_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job board where the job is posted */,
  "posted_date" TEXT /* Date the job was posted on the job board */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the job posting will expire */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the job board posting (e.g., active, expired) */,
  "posting_views" INTEGER /* Number of views the job posting has received */,
  "posting_applications" INTEGER /* Number of applications received for the job posting */,
  "posting_rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the job posting (e.g., on a scale of 1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("posting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_board_postings_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES jobs ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_board_postings_job_board_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_board_id") REFERENCES job_boards ("job_board_id")
)
